name: Nahim Moran Vera
tagline: I help businesses adopt AI through practical training, strategic guidance, and lightweight development support.
about: I work with teams that want to use AI more effectively without wasting time on hype. I offer AI training for staff, strategic advice on where AI can help the business, and development support for proof-of-concept tools and workflow improvements.

services.title: AI Training
services.description: Workshops and team sessions on AI fundamentals, prompting, responsible use, and practical business applications.

services.title: AI Strategy
services.description: Guidance on where AI fits in your business, what opportunities are worth pursuing, and how to prioritize implementation.

services.title: Development Support
services.description: Proof-of-concept assistants, internal tools, and simple AI-powered solutions to help teams test ideas quickly.

contactIntro: If you want AI support that is practical, understandable, and focused on real business value, get in touch.
